requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SEC Product Certification + Sello SEC (no single CE-equivalent mark in Chile)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SEC产品认证 + Sello SEC（智利无单一等同CE的标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SEC產品認證 + Sello SEC（智利無單一等同CE的標識）

summary.en: Placing a household refrigerator on the Chilean market requires clearing several separate mandatory gates rather than a single CE-style mark: (1) SEC product certification for electrical safety to NCh IEC 60335-2-24, evidenced by the SEC certificate and the SEC seal (sello SEC) affixed to the product; (2) the Chilean energy-efficiency label and registration under the Ministry of Energy / SEC programme; (3) for any wireless module, SUBTEL type approval. Certification is issued by SEC-authorised certification bodies and the SEC seal scheme is administered by SEC under Ley No 18.410. Customs clearance at ports (Valparaiso, San Antonio) and the importer of record (a Chilean RUT-registered entity) are practical prerequisites. There is no Chilean equivalent of a unified CE marking — safety (sello SEC) and energy (efficiency label) are separate marks, conceptually similar to China's split between CCC and the China Energy Label.
summary.zh: 将家用电冰箱投放智利市场须通过若干独立的强制门槛，而非单一的CE式标识：（1）按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC电气安全产品认证，以SEC证书及加贴于产品的SEC标志（sello SEC）为证；（2）能源部/SEC计划下的智利能效标签及登记；（3）任何无线模块须取得SUBTEL型式核准。认证由SEC授权认证机构签发，SEC标志方案依据Ley No 18.410由SEC管理。港口（Valparaiso、San Antonio）清关及登记进口商（在智利注册RUT的实体）为实务前提。智利没有等同于统一CE标志的标识——安全（sello SEC）与能效（能效标签）为分立标识，概念上类似中国CCC与中国能效标识的分立。
summary.zht: 將家用電冰箱投放智利市場須通過若干獨立的強制門檻，而非單一的CE式標識：（1）按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC電氣安全產品認證，以SEC證書及加貼於產品的SEC標誌（sello SEC）為證；（2）能源部/SEC計畫下的智利能效標籤及登記；（3）任何無線模組須取得SUBTEL型式核准。認證由SEC授權認證機構簽發，SEC標誌方案依據Ley No 18.410由SEC管理。港口（Valparaiso、San Antonio）清關及登記進口商（在智利註冊RUT的實體）為實務前提。智利沒有等同於統一CE標誌的標識——安全（sello SEC）與能效（能效標籤）為分立標識，概念上類似中國CCC與中國能效標識的分立。

standards_or_laws: Ley No 18.410 — SEC mandate over electrical product certification and the SEC seal (sello SEC)
SEC product certification (certificacion de productos electricos) to NCh IEC 60335-2-24 — mandatory electrical-safety gate
Ministry of Energy / SEC energy-efficiency label — mandatory energy gate
SUBTEL type approval (homologacion) — mandatory only where a wireless/RF module is present

summary.en: In China, a household refrigerator requires China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus the separate China Energy Label (based on GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies, and the China Energy Label is administered by NDRC/SAMR. China likewise has no single mark covering everything: CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy, structurally paralleling Chile's split between sello SEC and the efficiency label. However, the certificates, the issuing bodies, and the marks are entirely different and a Chinese CCC mark is not recognised in Chile.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须另有中国能效标识（基于GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构管理的强制性第三方认证，中国能效标识由NDRC/SAMR管理。中国同样没有涵盖一切的单一标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，在结构上与智利sello SEC和能效标签的分立相对应。但证书、签发机构和标识完全不同，中国CCC标识在智利不被承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須另有中國能效標識（基於GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構管理的強制性第三方認證，中國能效標識由NDRC/SAMR管理。中國同樣沒有涵蓋一切的單一標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，在結構上與智利sello SEC和能效標籤的分立相對應。但證書、簽發機構和標識完全不同，中國CCC標誌在智利不被承認。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must rebuild a Chile-specific compliance package; CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any Chilean gate: (1) obtain SEC product certification to NCh IEC 60335-2-24 through an SEC-authorised certifier and affix the sello SEC; (2) register and label energy efficiency under the Ministry of Energy / SEC programme with the Chilean class; (3) appoint or work through a Chilean RUT-registered importer of record who holds the SEC approvals and registrations; (4) obtain SUBTEL type approval if the model has a wireless module; (5) prepare Spanish-language product documentation and markings. A favourable factor is that Chile, China, and the IEC all base safety on IEC 60335-2-24 and energy on IEC 62552, so test data is largely re-usable and re-certification is mainly a procedural/recalculation exercise rather than a physical redesign — and the shared 50 Hz / 220 V grid avoids voltage/frequency re-engineering.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须重建智利专属合规文件包；CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何智利门槛：（1）通过SEC授权认证机构按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC产品认证并加贴sello SEC；（2）在能源部/SEC计划下按智利等级登记并标识能效；（3）委任或经由在智利注册RUT的登记进口商，由其持有SEC批准与登记；（4）若型号含无线模块则取得SUBTEL型式核准；（5）准备西班牙语产品文件及标识。有利因素是智利、中国和IEC在安全上均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础、能效上均以IEC 62552为基础，故检测数据大体可复用，重新认证主要是程序性/重新计算工作，而非实体重新设计——且共用的50 Hz/220 V电网可避免电压/频率重新工程。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須重建智利專屬合規文件包；CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何智利門檻：（1）通過SEC授權認證機構按NCh IEC 60335-2-24取得SEC產品認證並加貼sello SEC；（2）在能源部/SEC計畫下按智利等級登記並標識能效；（3）委任或經由在智利註冊RUT的登記進口商，由其持有SEC批准與登記；（4）若型號含無線模組則取得SUBTEL型式核准；（5）準備西班牙語產品文件及標識。有利因素是智利、中國和IEC在安全上均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎、能效上均以IEC 62552為基礎，故檢測數據大體可複用，重新認證主要是程序性/重新計算工作，而非實體重新設計——且共用的50 Hz/220 V電網可避免電壓/頻率重新工程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — sello SEC (safety certification) + energy-efficiency label required before import and sale; SUBTEL type approval mandatory only for wireless modules; a Chilean RUT-registered importer of record is required in practice
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for a refrigerator in Chile requires SEC product certification (sello SEC) for safety plus the Ministry of Energy / SEC efficiency label, with SUBTEL type approval only for wireless variants. There is no single CE-equivalent mark. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute, but because both countries base safety on IEC 60335-2-24 and energy on IEC 62552, the work is largely procedural recertification rather than redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱在智利的市场准入须取得SEC产品认证（sello SEC）以满足安全，并取得能源部/SEC能效标签，仅无线型号须SUBTEL型式核准。不存在单一等同CE的标识。中国CCC和中国能效标识不能替代，但由于两国安全均以IEC 60335-2-24、能效均以IEC 62552为基础，相关工作主要是程序性重新认证而非重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱在智利的市場准入須取得SEC產品認證（sello SEC）以滿足安全，並取得能源部/SEC能效標籤，僅無線型號須SUBTEL型式核准。不存在單一等同CE的標識。中國CCC和中國能效標識不能替代，但由於兩國安全均以IEC 60335-2-24、能效均以IEC 62552為基礎，相關工作主要是程序性重新認證而非重新設計。

requirement_topic.en: Importer of Record — Chilean RUT-Registered Responsible Party (no EU-style authorised-representative statute)
requirement_topic.zh: 登记进口商——在智利注册RUT的责任方（无类EU授权代表法定制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 登記進口商——在智利註冊RUT的責任方（無類EU授權代表法定制度）

summary.en: Chile does not have an EU-style statutory 'authorised representative' obligation written into a single market-surveillance regulation. Instead, the responsible party for a refrigerator placed on the Chilean market is, in practice, the importer of record — a Chilean RUT-registered legal entity that imports the product, holds the SEC product certification and the energy-efficiency-label registration, completes customs clearance (typically through Valparaiso or San Antonio), and is answerable to SEC for the product's compliance. SEC certificates and energy-label registrations are issued to or held through this importer. A Chinese manufacturer selling into Chile must therefore either operate through a Chilean importer/distributor that takes on this role or establish a Chilean entity. Customs and SEC documentation must identify this responsible importer; a logistics or customs agent alone does not discharge the responsibility.
summary.zh: 智利没有写入单一市场监督法规的类EU法定"授权代表"义务。相反，投放智利市场的电冰箱的责任方实务上为登记进口商——一个在智利注册RUT的法律实体，负责进口产品、持有SEC产品认证及能效标签登记、完成清关（通常经Valparaiso或San Antonio），并就产品合规向SEC负责。SEC证书及能效标签登记签发给该进口商或经其持有。因此，向智利销售的中国制造商须经由承担该角色的智利进口商/经销商运作，或设立智利实体。海关和SEC文件须标明该责任进口商；仅有物流或报关代理不能履行该责任。
summary.zht: 智利沒有寫入單一市場監督法規的類EU法定「授權代表」義務。相反，投放智利市場的電冰箱的責任方實務上為登記進口商——一個在智利註冊RUT的法律實體，負責進口產品、持有SEC產品認證及能效標籤登記、完成清關（通常經Valparaiso或San Antonio），並就產品合規向SEC負責。SEC證書及能效標籤登記簽發給該進口商或經其持有。因此，向智利銷售的中國製造商須經由承擔該角色的智利進口商/經銷商運作，或設立智利實體。海關和SEC文件須標明該責任進口商；僅有物流或報關代理不能履行該責任。

standards_or_laws: SEC certification scheme — certificates and energy-label registrations held by the Chilean importer of record
Chilean importer of record — RUT-registered legal entity responsible for customs clearance and SEC compliance
Servicio Nacional de Aduanas (Chilean Customs) — import clearance at Valparaiso / San Antonio requires an identified RUT-registered importer

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to designate a foreign-country resident responsible party for product compliance in the destination market. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market only; this role does not extend to or satisfy Chile's requirement for a RUT-registered importer of record who holds the Chilean SEC certification and answers to SEC.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商指定一名在目的市场境内居住、负责产品合规的责任方。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人仅为中国市场的责任方；该角色不延伸至、也不满足智利对持有智利SEC认证并向SEC负责的登记RUT进口商的要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商指定一名在目的市場境內居住、負責產品合規的責任方。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人僅為中國市場的責任方；該角色不延伸至、也不滿足智利對持有智利SEC認證並向SEC負責的登記RUT進口商的要求。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for a destination-market importer-of-record obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue, but it is lighter than the EU model: Chile has no separate 'authorised representative' statute distinct from the importer, so a single Chilean RUT-registered importer of record can carry the responsibility. Practical requirements for the Chinese exporter: (1) identify or appoint a Chilean importer/distributor (or set up a Chilean entity) that will hold the SEC certificate and the energy-label registration; (2) ensure that importer completes customs clearance at Valparaiso or San Antonio and is named in SEC and customs documentation; (3) supply the importer with the technical file (safety and energy test data, Spanish documentation) needed to obtain and maintain the SEC certification and efficiency label. Without a RUT-registered responsible importer, the product cannot be certified, cleared, or legally sold in Chile regardless of having Chinese CCC.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距，但比EU模式更轻：智利没有独立于进口商的单独"授权代表"法定制度，故单一的在智利注册RUT的登记进口商即可承担该责任。中国出口商的实务要求：（1）确定或委任将持有SEC证书及能效标签登记的智利进口商/经销商（或设立智利实体）；（2）确保该进口商在Valparaiso或San Antonio完成清关，并在SEC及海关文件中具名；（3）向该进口商提供取得并维持SEC认证及能效标签所需的技术文件（安全和能效检测数据、西班牙语文件）。无在智利注册RUT的责任进口商，无论是否持有中国CCC，产品均无法在智利认证、清关或合法销售。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距，但比EU模式更輕：智利沒有獨立於進口商的單獨「授權代表」法定制度，故單一的在智利註冊RUT的登記進口商即可承擔該責任。中國出口商的實務要求：（1）確定或委任將持有SEC證書及能效標籤登記的智利進口商/經銷商（或設立智利實體）；（2）確保該進口商在Valparaiso或San Antonio完成清關，並在SEC及海關文件中具名；（3）向該進口商提供取得並維持SEC認證及能效標籤所需的技術文件（安全和能效檢測數據、西班牙語文件）。無在智利註冊RUT的責任進口商，無論是否持有中國CCC，產品均無法在智利認證、清關或合法銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — a Chilean RUT-registered importer of record must hold the SEC certification and energy-label registration and complete customs clearance; Chile has no separate EU-style authorised-representative statute
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint a destination-market importer of record

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile has no EU-style authorised-representative statute, but in practice a Chilean RUT-registered importer of record must hold the SEC certification and energy-label registration and clear customs (Valparaiso / San Antonio). Chinese exporters must work through such an importer or establish a Chilean entity; a Chinese CCC certificate and a logistics/customs agent alone do not discharge this responsibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利没有类EU的授权代表法定制度，但实务上须有在智利注册RUT的登记进口商持有SEC认证及能效标签登记并完成清关（Valparaiso/San Antonio）。中国出口商须经由此类进口商或设立智利实体；仅凭中国CCC证书及物流/报关代理不能履行该责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利沒有類EU的授權代表法定制度，但實務上須有在智利註冊RUT的登記進口商持有SEC認證及能效標籤登記並完成清關（Valparaiso/San Antonio）。中國出口商須經由此類進口商或設立智利實體；僅憑中國CCC證書及物流/報關代理不能履行該責任。
